task_title: Which product draws the most complaints

scores.justification: The agent identified products in failed/refunded orders (p012, p049, p037) but never established a direct link between specific tickets and those products; tickets lack product_id fields and the agent did not trace ticket users' orders to their products systematically.
The agent retrieved all 30 tickets using `--limit 30` and confirmed this was the complete set by examining the full ticket list.
The agent identified p012 (Umbrella Tracker) as the product with the most failed/refunded orders (7 out of 9 total orders), citing specific order IDs: o046, o068, o069, o072, o093, o101, o111.

The agent did not quote any ticket subjects or bodies in the final answer; while tickets like t019 ('billing broken since the weekend') and t029 ('Product SKU conflict when duplicating a catalog') were retrieved, they were never cited as evidence for the chosen product.
